My Life in Ruins (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $8,677,425Details
International Box Office $11,800,000
Worldwide Box Office $20,477,425
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $9,895,471
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $998,108
Total $10,893,579
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,223,161 (37.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.69 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,164 opening theaters/1,165 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $13,837,600

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 5th, 2009 (Wide) by Fox Searchlight
Video Release: October 6th, 2009 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content
Running Time: 95 minutes
Plot point: Romance
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
